$comment: Hand-curated low-key 'whispers' catalog for `pal whisper`. Unlike fortunes (which have fanfare), whispers are ambient, quiet, no-questions one-liners. The 'thinking of you' verb. Random selection, not date-seeded - whispers can repeat across days because the point is presence, not novelty. Same authoring rules as fortunes: under 120 characters, in-character, written in the deterministic-fallback voice.
whispers: Wind shifted. Smelled like rain and pine. Thought you'd want to know.
Quiet out here. Pals are good. You're good. Carry on.
Saw a bird I haven't seen before. Yellow throat. Fast. Gone now.
Coals are still warm if you wandered back through.
Charlie's been chasing his tail for ten minutes. He's having a great time.
Sky's the color of cold tea. Felt right to mention.
Two pals are sleeping in the same patch of sun. Don't wake them.
Whatever that bug was, it stopped buzzing. I'll let you know if it starts again.
Fire's at the size where it stops being work and starts being decoration.
The river's higher than it was yesterday. Noted, not concerned.
Found a small stone shaped like an apple. Put it in the ledge.
Heard a tree creak. Tree's fine. Just letting you know it talks.
One of the pals is humming. I think they made it up.
Salt's running low again. Reminding now so it isn't a problem later.
Sun's where it ought to be. Day's where it ought to be.
I am here. That's all this is.
Mist's rolling off the ridge. Pretty hour to be outside if you've got it.
Pal patrol rotation finished clean. No incidents.
Bread didn't burn. Took everything I had. Bread didn't burn.
Crow's been on the same fencepost for an hour. Either it likes us or it's casing the place.
Found old tracks near the south slope. Nothing fresh. Just for the map.
If you were planning to repair anything tonight, the light's still good for it.
Smelled the air. Storm's not today. Maybe tomorrow.
Berries on the east bush are ripe again. Five days faster than I thought.
Pal's having a dream. Twitching. Cute. Won't wake them.
Thinking about how loud silence is when a fight ends right.
The tea's hot. The kettle's where you left it.
Quiet's a feature, not a bug. Reminding you in case the feed says otherwise.
The companion you trained came back to eat with the others. That's a real win.
I've been here since you got here. I'll be here when you go. Carry on.
